goal: Scan Gmail inbox for recent emails, classify urgent ones by keyword matching, mark them as important, apply tracking label, and email a summary of actions taken

config.description: Gmail search query to find target emails, excluding already-processed ones
Comma-separated list of keywords that indicate urgency (case-insensitive match against subject and body)
Gmail label to apply to processed urgent emails to prevent re-processing
Email address to receive the summary report

invariants: Only emails matching urgency keywords in subject or body are marked as important
Already-labeled emails (with tracking label) are excluded from processing
Every urgent email gets both the important flag and the tracking label
Summary email is always sent, even if no urgent emails were found
required_outcomes: All urgent emails in the search results are marked as important in Gmail
All urgent emails receive the tracking label to prevent re-processing
A summary email is sent to the configured recipient listing all flagged emails or stating none were found

steps.summary: Search Gmail inbox for recent emails excluding already-processed ones, fetching full content for keyword analysis
Classify each email as urgent or not-urgent by checking if subject or body contains any of the configured urgency keywords (case-insensitive): today, urgent, immediately, now, sensitive
Split classified emails into urgent and not-urgent subsets, and count urgent emails
For each urgent email, mark as important and apply the tracking label in Gmail

do.summary: Mark the urgent email as important and apply the AgentsPilot tracking label

steps.summary: Generate an HTML summary email body listing all urgent emails that were flagged, or stating none were found. Include sender, subject, date, and matched keywords for each.

generate.instruction: Generate an HTML email body summarizing the urgent email processing results. Use the urgent_count to determine if any emails were flagged. If urgent_count is 0, produce a message saying 'No urgent emails were found in this scan.' If urgent_count > 0, produce a professional HTML table with columns: Sender, Subject, Received Date, Matched Keywords. For each email in urgent_emails, include the sender (from field), subject, date, and attempt to identify which urgency keywords (today, urgent, immediately, now, sensitive) matched in the subject or body. Use clean professional styling with borders, header background color, and padding. Include a header line like 'Urgent Emails Flagged as Important' and a count summary.

outputs.name: subject
outputs.description: Email subject line, e.g. 'Urgent emails marked Important (summary)'

outputs.name: body
outputs.description: Full HTML body of the summary email

steps.summary: Send the summary email to the configured recipient with the list of flagged urgent emails

meta.idempotency_note: Tracking label ensures emails are not re-processed on subsequent runs
